parameters.filterByFormula: AND({Enrichment Status} = 'Pending', OR({Last Processed} = '', IS_BEFORE({Last Processed}, DATEADD(TODAY(), -1, 'days'))))

parameters.text:
ℹ️ *Outbound Pipeline — No Prospects to Process*

All records are either processed or not yet due. Pipeline exited cleanly.

_Run time: {{ new Date().toISOString() }}_

value.Error Message: Airtable write failed for Outbound Queue

parameters.content:
## Trigger Nodes. 

Three triggers given for flexibility & testing.

## Fetch records from AirTable

This part is to fetch records from airtable . Any fetch errors will be alerted in slack

## Enrichment of the prospects date

The fetched data is enriched using Apollo or any data provider just to get more data about them and to be with the latest data. Here a mock enrichment is done since we dont have apollo subscription. Any enrichment error is logged to our pipeline error table.

## Fit Scoring of the prospects
The enriched data is being evaluated by a rule based system to be given a score for further processing.

## AI Drafting

Claude AI evaluates the lead, writes an emial, subject, a personalised hook. Any error is caught in tthe error queue.

## Save final draft 

Final draft is saved to the airtable outbound queue and ready for a human to review the draft and send it out.

## Send Summary

The summary of the entire batch run is sent to the respective slack channel with a descriptive message.
